name: article-pool
description: Self-contained article creation workflows for Codex, including the mm-article multimodal skill.

interface.longDescription: Article Pool provides self-contained skills, workflow contracts, and deterministic scripts for creating, reviewing, illustrating, and publishing articles with Codex-like multimodal agents.
defaultPrompt: Use mm-article to create a WeChat draft.
Plan visuals for this article with mm-article.
Review this article with multimodal gates.
